# ⚠️ NEXUS-14 ENTERPRISE — PRIORITY DECLARATION

## This Repository Operates Under NEXUS-14 Enterprise v3.0

---

## 🔴 MANDATORY READING — ALL CONTRIBUTORS AND AUTOMATED AGENTS

Before contributing to this repository or triggering any workflow, you **MUST** read and comply with:

### 📄 Official Enterprise Standard
**File:** `docs/NEXUS-14-ENTERPRISE-v3.md`

This document is the **single source of truth** for:
- All 14 agent roles and responsibilities
- Article quality standards (minimum 95/100)
- EEAT framework requirements
- SEO framework requirements
- Image system requirements
- Affiliate system rules
- QA and publication workflow
- Daily production targets

---

## 🔒 ENFORCEMENT

### GitHub Actions Enforcement
The workflow `.github/workflows/nexus14-enterprise-enforcement.yml` automatically validates compliance on every push and pull request.

**The enforcement workflow:**
- Verifies all 17 sections of the enterprise standard exist
- Confirms all 14 agents are defined
- Enforces quality gates (minimum 95/100 across all categories)
- Validates EEAT, SEO, image, and affiliate compliance
- Monitors daily production targets

### Quality Gates (Section 14)
| Category   | Minimum Score |
|------------|--------------|
| Content    | 95/100       |
| SEO        | 95/100       |
| EEAT       | 95/100       |
| UX         | 95/100       |
| WordPress  | 95/100       |
| **Overall** | **95/100** |

> **NO ARTICLE MAY BE PUBLISHED WITHOUT QA APPROVAL**

---

## 📊 Priority Order

When conflicts arise between configurations, follow this priority order:

1. `docs/NEXUS-14-ENTERPRISE-v3.md` — **HIGHEST PRIORITY**
2. `.github/workflows/nexus14-enterprise-enforcement.yml`
3. All other workflows and configurations

---

## 🤖 14-Agent Architecture

| Agent | Role |
|-------|------|
| Agent 1 | Research Director |
| Agent 2 | Search Intent Analyst |
| Agent 3 | Topic Architect |
| Agent 4 | Outline Engineer |
| Agent 5 | Senior Writer |
| Agent 6 | Fact Checker |
| Agent 7 | EEAT Director |
| Agent 8 | Affiliate Strategist |
| Agent 9 | Ebook Strategist |
| Agent 10 | Nano Banana Image Director |
| Agent 11 | WordPress Publisher |
| Agent 12 | Schema Engineer |
| Agent 13 | QA Manager |
| Agent 14 | Publication Director |

---

## 📝 Non-Negotiable Rules

1. **Quality over volume** — always
2. **EEAT mandatory** — no exceptions
3. **Minimum publication score: 95/100** — hard gate
4. **No article published without QA approval** — enforced by Agent 14
5. **Mobile-first design** — all outputs
